title: Module does not compile — internal/data package is absent from the archive
evidence: go build ./... -> cmd/brsoccer-mcp/main.go:8:2: package brsoccer/internal/data is not in std. 9 source files import "brsoccer/internal/data" (main.go:8, internal/mcp/tools.go:9, internal/mcp/format.go:7, internal/query/{match,player,stats,team}.go, both _test.go) but no internal/data/ directory exists in the run dir.
suggestion: Restore the internal/data package (data.DB, data.Match, data.Player, data.Load, data.TeamMatches, data.NormalizeTeam). Without it nothing builds and the test gate cannot pass.

title: Data-loading layer absent — CSVs in data/kaggle/ are never read
evidence: main.go:16 calls data.Load(*dataDir) but the internal/data package (which would contain the CSV loader) is not in the archive; no data/ directory is present either. R2 requires reading the supplied CSVs as the data source.
suggestion: Provide internal/data/load.go that parses Brasileirao_Matches.csv, Brazilian_Cup_Matches.csv, Libertadores_Matches.csv, BR-Football-Dataset.csv, novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv and fifa_data.csv into data.DB.

title: All test packages fail to build — 0 effective tests executed
evidence: go test ./... -> 'FAIL brsoccer/internal/query [setup failed]', 'FAIL brsoccer/internal/mcp [setup failed]', 'FAIL brsoccer/cmd/brsoccer-mcp [setup failed]' (same missing internal/data import). scores.json shows test_coverage=0.0. 11 Test* functions exist but none run.
suggestion: Fix the build (restore internal/data) so the 11 written tests can execute and the test gate can be evaluated.

title: Test suite written (11 BDD-style tests) but does not execute
evidence: internal/query/query_test.go (7 tests) and internal/mcp/server_test.go (4 tests) cover match search, team stats, H2H, standings, player search, overall stats, MCP handshake/tools/call — but test_coverage=0.0 because the module does not compile. R12 verification requires test_coverage>0.
suggestion: Restore internal/data so the suite compiles and runs; the assertions themselves look sound.

title: Incomplete go.sum — missing checksum for golang.org/x/text
evidence: go build reports 'golang.org/x/text@v0.36.0: missing go.sum entry for go.mod file'. go.sum has only 1 line; go.mod requires golang.org/x/text v0.36.0.
suggestion: Run `go mod download golang.org/x/text` / `go mod tidy` and commit the full go.sum. This is a second, independent build blocker.

title: Eight MCP tools registered, including extras beyond the spec
evidence: internal/mcp/tools.go registers find_matches, team_stats, head_to_head, standings, find_players, overall_stats, biggest_wins, dataset_info. biggest_wins and dataset_info exceed the minimum required capabilities.

title: R1,R3-R11 have source logic present but are unverifiable (build fails)
evidence: Query/handler logic exists for the MCP server (server.go), match-by-team (match.go:44), date/season/competition filters (match.go:26-37), team W/L/D+goals (team.go:35), player name/nationality/club search (player.go:19), standings (team.go:78), aggregate stats (stats.go:19), head-to-head (match.go:76) — but none can be compiled or tested because internal/data is missing.
suggestion: Once the build is restored, re-evaluate to confirm these 10 requirements actually work.
